title: Senior Software Developer
description: We are looking for a software engineer with experience in web development and knowledge of JavaScript, React, and Node.js. The ideal candidate should be able to work in a team and have strong communication skills.

content.description: Tech Solutions Inc. is seeking a highly motivated and experienced Senior Software Engineer to join our remote team. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in software development, with experience in designing, developing, and implementing scalable and high-performance software solutions. As a Senior Software Engineer, you will be responsible for leading development projects, mentoring junior engineers, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software products.
content.responsibilities:
- Design, develop, and maintain web applications using modern technologies.
- Collaborate with product and design teams to define and deliver new features.
- Write clean, efficient, and well-documented code.
- Conduct code reviews and provide constructive feedback to team members.
- Mentor junior engineers and guide their professional development.
- Participate in team planning meetings and retrospectives.
- Stay up to date with the latest trends and best practices in software development.
content.requirements:
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or a related field.
- Minimum of 5 years of experience in software development.
- Experience with JavaScript frameworks (e.g., React, Angular, Vue.js).
- Familiarity with agile methodologies and version control tools (e.g., Git).
- Excellent communication skills and ability to work in a team.
- Proven ability to solve complex problems and think critically.
content.about: Tech Solutions Inc. is an innovative technology company focused on creating cutting-edge software solutions for various industries. We are committed to fostering a collaborative and inclusive work environment where every employee can thrive and grow professionally. We offer competitive salaries, comprehensive benefits, and continuous professional development opportunities.

title: Data Analyst
description: We are looking for a data analyst with experience handling large datasets and data visualization tools. Knowledge of SQL, Python, and R is required.

content.description: Data Driven Co. is looking for a Data Analyst to join our team in Mexico City. This position is ideal for professionals who are starting their career in data analysis and want to work with large volumes of information to generate valuable insights that drive business decisions.
content.responsibilities:
- Collect, process, and analyze large datasets to identify patterns and trends.
- Create visualizations and reports using tools such as Tableau or Power BI.
- Collaborate with different departments to understand their data needs.
- Write efficient SQL queries to extract and transform data.
- Develop scripts in Python or R to automate recurring analyses.
- Present findings and recommendations to non-technical stakeholders.
content.requirements:
- Bachelor's degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, or a related field.
- Strong knowledge of SQL for database querying.
- Experience with Python (Pandas, NumPy) or R for data analysis.
- Familiarity with data visualization tools.
- Analytical mindset and attention to detail.
- Strong communication skills to explain technical results.
content.about: Data Driven Co. is a leading company in data analytics solutions that helps organizations make data-driven decisions. We offer a continuous learning environment, professional growth opportunities, and the chance to work with cutting-edge technologies in the data analytics field.

title: Mobile Application Developer
description: We are looking for a mobile application developer with experience in iOS and/or Android. The candidate should have knowledge of Swift, Kotlin, and user interface development.

content.description: Mobile Apps Ltd. is seeking a Mobile Application Developer with experience in building native and cross-platform applications. You will work on diverse projects that impact millions of users, developing innovative and high-performance mobile solutions.
content.responsibilities:
- Develop native mobile applications for iOS using Swift or Android using Kotlin.
- Implement attractive and functional user interfaces following design guidelines.
- Integrate RESTful APIs and backend services into mobile applications.
- Optimize application performance across different devices.
- Participate in code reviews and quality testing.
- Stay up to date with the latest trends in mobile development.
content.requirements:
- Proven experience developing mobile applications (iOS or Android).
- Proficiency in Swift for iOS or Kotlin for Android.
- Knowledge of cross-platform frameworks such as React Native or Flutter.
- Understanding of mobile UI/UX design principles.
- Experience with version control (Git).
- A portfolio of published applications on the App Store or Google Play is a plus.
content.about: Mobile Apps Ltd. is a company specialized in mobile application development that has created solutions for clients across various industries. We value creativity, innovation, and teamwork. We offer a dynamic environment where developers can grow professionally and work with the latest mobile technologies.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: We are looking for a DevOps engineer with experience in managing cloud infrastructure, process automation, and continuous integration tools. Knowledge of AWS, Azure, or GCP is required.

content.description: Cloud Services SA is looking for a DevOps Engineer to manage and optimize our cloud infrastructure. You will be responsible for implementing CI/CD practices, automating deployments, and ensuring high availability of our production systems.
content.responsibilities:
- Design, implement, and maintain cloud infrastructure on AWS, Azure, or GCP.
- Develop and maintain CI/CD pipelines to automate deployments.
- Manage containers with Docker and orchestrate them using Kubernetes.
- Implement infrastructure as code using Terraform or CloudFormation.
- Monitor systems and resolve production incidents.
- Optimize cloud infrastructure cost and performance.
- Collaborate with development teams to improve delivery processes.
content.requirements:
- Hands-on experience with at least one cloud platform (AWS, Azure, or GCP).
- Strong knowledge of Docker and Kubernetes.
- Experience with IaC tools such as Terraform or Ansible.
- Familiarity with CI/CD tools (Jenkins, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions).
- Scripting skills (Bash, Python).
- Understanding of networking, security, and cloud best practices.
- Cloud certifications are a plus.
content.about: Cloud Services SA is a leading cloud solutions company that helps organizations migrate and optimize their infrastructure. We work with cutting-edge technologies and offer a flexible remote work environment, along with certification opportunities and continuous professional development.

title: UX/UI Designer
description: We are looking for a UX/UI designer with a passion for creating exceptional digital experiences. Experience with Figma, user-centered design, and collaboration with development teams is required.

content.description: Creative Minds Studio is seeking a creative and detail-oriented UX/UI Designer to craft intuitive and visually appealing interfaces. You will work on innovative projects, from concept to final delivery.
content.responsibilities:
- Create wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity designs using Figma.
- Conduct user research and usability testing.
- Design user-centered interfaces for web and mobile applications.
- Collaborate closely with developers to ensure proper implementation.
- Maintain and evolve design systems and style guides.
- Present design concepts to stakeholders and clients.
content.requirements:
- Strong portfolio demonstrating UX/UI design experience.
- Proficiency in Figma and knowledge of other tools such as Sketch or Adobe XD.
- Experience with user-centered design methodologies.
- Understanding of visual design principles, typography, and color theory.
- Ability to create interactive prototypes.
- Excellent communication and presentation skills.
content.about: Creative Minds Studio is a digital design studio based in Barcelona, specializing in creating exceptional experiences for innovative brands. We foster creativity, collaboration, and professional growth in an inspiring environment.

title: Database Administrator
description: We are looking for a database administrator with experience in PostgreSQL and MySQL. The candidate will be responsible for ensuring the availability, security, and performance of production databases.

content.description: Secure Data Corp. is seeking an experienced Database Administrator to manage and optimize our critical database systems. You will be responsible for ensuring the integrity, availability, and security of the company's data.
content.responsibilities:
- Administer and maintain PostgreSQL and MySQL databases in production environments.
- Implement backup and disaster recovery strategies.
- Monitor database performance and optimize queries.
- Manage database security, users, and permissions.
- Plan and execute database upgrades and migrations.
- Resolve critical database-related incidents.
- Document procedures and configurations.
content.requirements:
- Strong experience in PostgreSQL and MySQL administration.
- Knowledge of NoSQL databases such as MongoDB or Redis.
- Experience with automation scripting (Bash, Python).
- Understanding of replication, clustering, and high availability.
- Knowledge of database security and best practices.
- Ability to work under pressure and solve critical issues.
content.about: Secure Data Corp. is a company specialized in secure data management solutions for organizations across various industries. We offer a professional environment with growth opportunities and certifications in database technologies.

title: Cybersecurity Specialist
description: We are looking for a cybersecurity specialist with knowledge in infrastructure protection, vulnerability analysis, and incident response. Experience with SIEM and security certifications is a plus.

content.description: SafeNet Solutions is seeking a Cybersecurity Specialist to protect our systems and data against threats. You will work on implementing security measures, risk analysis, and responding to security incidents.
content.responsibilities:
- Monitor and analyze security events using SIEM tools.
- Perform vulnerability assessments and penetration testing.
- Implement and manage security solutions (firewalls, IDS/IPS).
- Respond to security incidents and conduct forensic investigations.
- Develop and maintain security policies and procedures.
- Stay up to date with emerging threats and security trends.
- Train staff on security best practices.
content.requirements:
- Experience in cybersecurity and risk management.
- Knowledge of SIEM tools and log analysis.
- Experience with penetration testing and vulnerability assessment.
- Familiarity with security frameworks (NIST, ISO 27001).
- Certifications such as CEH, CISSP, or CompTIA Security+ are a plus.
- Strong analytical skills and ability to solve complex problems.
content.about: SafeNet Solutions is a leading cybersecurity services company that helps organizations protect their digital assets. We offer a flexible remote work environment, certification opportunities, and continuous professional development in the field of information security.

title: Product Manager
description: We are looking for a Product Manager with experience in defining and launching digital products. Strong analytical skills, leadership, and knowledge of agile methodologies are required.

content.description: NextGen Technologies is seeking a Senior Product Manager to lead the development and launch of innovative digital products. You will be responsible for defining the product vision, working with stakeholders, and guiding cross-functional teams.
content.responsibilities:
- Define and communicate the product vision and strategy.
- Manage the backlog and prioritize features based on business value.
- Collaborate with development, design, and marketing teams.
- Conduct market research and competitive analysis.
- Analyze product metrics and make data-driven decisions.
- Plan and coordinate product launches.
- Gather feedback from users and stakeholders.
content.requirements:
- Proven experience as a Product Manager for digital products.
- Strong knowledge of agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban).
- Analytical skills and experience with analytics tools.
- Excellent communication and leadership skills.
- Ability to make data-driven decisions.
- Experience with tools such as Jira and Confluence.
- Bachelor's degree in business, technology, or a related field.
content.about: NextGen Technologies is an innovative company that develops cutting-edge digital products. We value leadership, innovation, and strategic thinking. We offer a dynamic environment with opportunities for growth and professional development.

title: Frontend Developer
description: We are looking for a frontend developer with experience in React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Knowledge of performance optimization and web accessibility is a plus.

content.description: Bright Web Studio is seeking a Frontend Developer with experience in modern technologies to build attractive and high-performance web interfaces. You will work on diverse projects that require attention to detail and technical excellence.

- Implement responsive designs with Tailwind CSS.
- Optimize applications for maximum performance and scalability.
- Ensure web accessibility following WCAG standards.
- Collaborate with designers and backend developers.
- Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code.

title: Backend Developer
description: We are looking for a backend developer with experience in Node.js, Express, and NoSQL databases. Knowledge of microservices architecture is required.

content.description: APIWorks is seeking a Backend Developer with experience in Node.js to build robust and scalable APIs. You will work on microservices architectures and high-performance distributed systems.
content.responsibilities:
- Design and develop RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express.
- Implement business logic in a microservices architecture.
- Work with NoSQL databases, especially MongoDB.
- Optimize database queries and operations for performance.
- Implement authentication, authorization, and API security.
- Write unit and integration tests.
- Document APIs and code.
content.requirements:
- Strong experience with Node.js and Express.
- Deep knowledge of JavaScript/TypeScript.
- Experience with MongoDB and NoSQL databases.
- Understanding of microservices architecture.
- Familiarity with RESTful APIs and design principles.
- Experience with version control (Git).
- Knowledge of containers (Docker) is a plus.
content.about: APIWorks is a company specialized in API development and scalable backend solutions. We offer a professional environment with opportunities to work on challenging projects using modern technologies.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: We are looking for a machine learning engineer with experience in predictive models and data processing. Knowledge of TensorFlow, PyTorch, and MLOps is a plus.

content.description: AI Labs is seeking a Senior Machine Learning Engineer to develop and deploy ML models in production. You will work on cutting-edge projects applying advanced machine learning techniques to solve complex problems.
content.responsibilities:
- Design, train, and deploy machine learning models.
- Process and analyze large volumes of data for training.
- Implement MLOps pipelines to automate the model lifecycle.
- Evaluate and optimize model performance in production.
- Collaborate with product and data engineering teams.
- Research and apply new ML techniques and algorithms.
- Document processes, models, and results.
content.requirements:
- Master's or PhD in Computer Science, Statistics, or a related field.
- Strong experience with TensorFlow, PyTorch, or similar frameworks.
- Proficiency in Python and ML libraries (scikit-learn, pandas, numpy).
- Experience deploying models in production.
- Knowledge of MLOps and orchestration tools.
- Strong background in mathematics and statistics.
- Publications or contributions to ML projects are a plus.
content.about: AI Labs is an artificial intelligence research and development company working on ML solutions across various industries. We offer a flexible remote work environment, access to cutting-edge computational resources, and opportunities to contribute to innovative research.

content.responsibilities:

- Develop scalable test automation frameworks.
- Integrate automated tests into CI/CD pipelines.
- Execute and maintain regression test suites.
- Identify, document, and track defects.

content.requirements:

- Knowledge of Selenium, Cypress, or Playwright.
- Experience with testing frameworks (Jest, Mocha, JUnit).
- Familiarity with CI/CD integration (Jenkins, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions).

- Strong analytical skills and attention to detail.
content.about: Quality First is a company dedicated to ensuring excellence in software quality. We offer a collaborative environment where QA engineers are valued as an integral part of the development process.

content.about: InfraTech Global is a technology infrastructure services company that provides solutions to organizations of various sizes. We offer a professional environment with opportunities for certification and growth in the infrastructure field.
